description: CCEM APM full redesign — Claude Design handoff implementation: design system (tokens + 20 components), 42 wireframe pages across 7 sections. Phoenix LiveView / Elixir / ETS / PubSub / D3.js.

userStories.title: DS: tokens.css → Phoenix CSS layer + Geist fonts
userStories.description: Import ccem_tokens.css into app.css as a @layer base block. Add Geist + Geist Mono via Google Fonts link in root layout. Verify all --ccem-* custom properties resolve in browser dev tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Browser renders oklch() colors correctly (no fallback grey)

userStories.title: DS: Button LiveComponent (5 variants × 4 sizes)
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.Button as a Phoenix.Component function component. Variants: primary (lime), secondary, ghost, outline, destructive. Sizes: xs/sm/md/lg. Keyboard focus ring with --ccem-iris.
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 sizes apply correct padding/height tokens

userStories.title: DS: Badge + Dot primitives (7 tones, presence animation)
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.Badge and ApmV5.Components.Dot. Badge: 7 tones (neutral/accent/ok/warn/err/info/iris), pill and square variants, optional animated presence dot.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 tones render correctly using token colors
Animated dot uses ccem-pulse CSS class

userStories.title: DS: Input + Kbd chip primitives
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.Input (text/number/search, optional icon slot, ⌘K affordance) and ApmV5.Components.Kbd (keyboard shortcut chip using --ccem-font-mono).
acceptanceCriteria: Kbd renders with tabular mono font

userStories.title: DS: Card + Stat tile + Table primitives
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.Card (1px ccem-line border, ccem-bg-1 fill, no drop shadow), ApmV5.Components.Stat (label/value/delta with sparkline slot), and ApmV5.Components.Table (dense 36px rows, monospaced numerics, keyboard j/k nav).
acceptanceCriteria: Stat tile shows delta with correct semantic tone
Table rows keyboard navigable with j/k

userStories.title: DS: Segmented control + Toggle primitives
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.Segmented (option group, keyboard arrow nav) and ApmV5.Components.Toggle (boolean switch, lime when on). Both emit phx-change events.

userStories.title: DS: Scaffolding — Sidebar nav (10 groups, collapsible)
userStories.description: Implement the shared left sidebar LiveComponent: 10 intent groups, collapsible sections, active highlight via active_nav assign, keyboard accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: All 10 nav groups render with correct icons

userStories.title: DS: Scaffolding — Top bar (project switcher, ⌘K trigger, presence)
userStories.description: Implement the shared top bar LiveComponent: CCEM logo, project switcher dropdown (DashboardScopeEngine via PubSub), ⌘K trigger button, presence stack, account menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Project switcher updates scope via PubSub
Presence stack shows live session count

userStories.title: DS AI: Sparkline + Bars (live 60-point window, animated trailing dot)
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.Sparkline as a Phoenix Hook-driven SVG component. 60-point sliding window, animated trailing dot when live: true. ApmV5.Components.AI.Bars: micro bar chart for token distribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Sparkline animates new data points via phx-hook

userStories.title: DS AI: StreamingText + Skeleton shimmer
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.StreamingText: token-by-token append via PubSub, blinking caret while streaming, caret removed on DONE event. ApmV5.Components.AI.Skeleton: shimmer loading placeholder.
acceptanceCriteria: StreamingText receives tokens via :ai_stream PubSub topic

userStories.title: DS AI: Waveform + Gauge LiveComponents
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.Waveform: 14-bar processing indicator (tone: accent|iris), animated when live. ApmV5.Components.AI.Gauge: radial 0–100% SVG gauge with needle and AccentGlow ring.
acceptanceCriteria: Waveform bars animate with staggered delays
Gauge needle rotates to correct angle

userStories.title: DS AI: AgentCard LiveComponent (identicon, sparkline, skill badges)
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.AgentCard: generative identicon avatar (hashed from agent_id), live sparkline of recent activity, status badge, skill badge list, model label. Subscribes to per-agent PubSub.
acceptanceCriteria: Status badge reflects live agent status

userStories.title: DS AI: CommandBar ⌘K (global, focus trap, groups, AI streaming)
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.CommandBar as a LiveComponent with JS hook. Global ⌘K, focus trap, three groups (Jump/Act/Ask), arrow key navigation, Esc to dismiss, AI Suggestions streams via StreamingText.

userStories.title: DS AI: GraphNode + Edge (D3.js, animated live edges, PubSub 3s TTL)
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.GraphNode and Edge for D3.js dependency visualization. Edge animation when PubSub event observed within last 3s. Nodes: type-colored by formation role, status glow.
acceptanceCriteria: Edges animate when data flowing (PubSub 3s TTL)
D3.js force layout stable after 300ms settle

userStories.title: DS AI: Presence stack + Right inspector panel scaffolding
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Components.AI.Presence: avatar cluster with live dot pulse (2s), count overflow badge. Implement shared right inspector LiveComponent: contextual slot (selection/copilot/filters), collapsible.
acceptanceCriteria: Presence dot pulses every 2s while session alive
Right inspector slot switches context on selection

userStories.title: DS: Motion constants, scanline, page layout shell + DS TDD suite
userStories.description: Add all CSS keyframe animations to app.css. Implement shared page layout shell (sidebar + topbar + content + inspector). Write ExUnit tests for all DS primitives (render smoke tests, assign validation).
acceptanceCriteria: All CSS keyframe animations defined in app.css
ExUnit suite: 40+ tests for DS components

userStories.title: Observe: Dashboard LiveView (6-up metrics, formation graph, fleet table, AI anomaly rail)
userStories.description: Implement DashboardLive redesign: 6-up metric strip with live Sparklines, center D3.js formation dependency graph with scanline, fleet table rows as AgentCards, right AI Anomaly Insights panel with StreamingText.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 stat tiles render with live sparklines
AI Anomaly panel streams insights text

userStories.title: Observe: Fleet LiveView (agent grid/list, AgentCard components, filter rail)
userStories.description: Implement FleetLive redesign: agent grid (AgentCard components, 4-up), list view toggle, filter rail (status/model/project/role), search input with ⌘K affordance.
acceptanceCriteria: Filters update agent list reactively via PubSub

userStories.title: Observe: Session Detail LiveView (JSONL viewer, tool call trace, token breakdown)
userStories.description: Implement SessionDetailLive redesign: JSONL event stream viewer with StreamingText, tool call trace timeline, token breakdown Stat tiles, per-turn latency bars.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool call trace shows call/result pairs
Token breakdown updates on new event

userStories.title: Govern: Authorization v9 LiveView (20s TTL countdown, policy rules, scope test panel)
userStories.description: Implement AuthorizationLive redesign: pending banner with 20s countdown (monospaced, lime), depleting progress bar, Approve/Deny actions, policy rules table (effect/scope/agent/tool/token_id), scope test dry-run panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Countdown depletes in real-time via PubSub
Scope test panel returns allow/deny for test input

userStories.title: Observe: Formations LiveView (tree + matrix + list + dot layout modes)
userStories.description: Implement FormationLive redesign: 4 layout mode tabs, scope selector, D3.js tree with animated pub/sub edges, agent status pills, formation metadata panel.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 layout modes switch without page reload
Pub/sub edges animate when data flowing

userStories.title: Observe: Timeline LiveView (swim-lane, 15m→24h window, D3.js time axis)
userStories.description: Implement TimelineLive redesign: horizontal swim-lane per agent, time window selector (15m/1h/4h/24h), tool call markers, session bands, D3.js time axis.
acceptanceCriteria: Swim lanes render one per active agent
Time window selector updates range via PubSub
Tool call markers clickable to Session Detail

userStories.title: Observe: Conversations LiveView (live transcript, CoWork split)
userStories.description: Implement ConversationLive redesign: live transcript with StreamingText for active turns, CoWork split-panel for parallel conversation comparison, turn navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Active turns stream tokens via PubSub
CoWork split renders two conversations side by side

userStories.title: Observe: Tool Calls + A2A + Architecture LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement ToolCallsLive (stream view, per-agent stats), A2ALive (router table, broadcast log, fan-out graph with D3.js), ArchitectureLive (supervision tree, GenServer list).
acceptanceCriteria: A2A fan-out graph renders with D3.js
Architecture supervision tree shows all GenServers

userStories.title: Observe Wave 3 TDD suite (Dashboard, Fleet, Session Detail, Authorization v9)
userStories.description: Write ExUnit + LiveView test suite for Wave 3 views: DashboardLive (PubSub assigns, metric strip), FleetLive (filter events), SessionDetailLive (JSONL parsing), AuthorizationLive (countdown timer, approve/deny events).
acceptanceCriteria: PubSub integration tests with mock broadcasts

userStories.title: Measure: Analytics + Usage + Health LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement AnalyticsLive (tokens/models/tools charts with D3.js, 7d/30d windows), UsageLive (Claude cost, LVM limits, per-project utilization table), HealthLive (BootReporter telemetry, system vitals Gauge components).
acceptanceCriteria: Analytics charts render with real token data
Health Gauges animate on live data

userStories.title: Measure: Ports + Tasks + Actions + Scanner LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement PortsLive (lsof scan results, conflict detection), TasksLive (long-running jobs, progress bars), ActionsLive (ActionEngine catalog, last-run stats), ScannerLive (project discovery, file tree).
acceptanceCriteria: Ports scan shows real lsof data
Tasks show progress bars updating via PubSub
Actions catalog renders with status badges

userStories.title: Measure: UAT + DRTW LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement UATLive (acceptance test runs, pass/fail grid) and DRTWLive (reuse registry, semantic match %, duplicate candidates panel, register form, reuse score).
acceptanceCriteria: DRTW registry searchable with filter tabs

userStories.title: Intelligence: Skills + Skill Drift LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement SkillsLive (registry table, 3-tier health grid: system/user/project) and SkillDriftLive (drift detector results, before/after diff panel, fix wizard with suggested actions).
acceptanceCriteria: 3-tier health grid renders all skill scopes
Drift detector shows changed skills since last check
Fix wizard suggests specific corrective actions

userStories.title: Intelligence: Library + Memory LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement LibraryLive (agents/skills/MCP servers/hooks catalog with search) and MemoryLive redesign (observation list, timeline tab, correlation graph, detail panel) using DS components.
acceptanceCriteria: Correlation graph links observations to sessions

userStories.title: Intelligence: Orchestration + Intake + Alignment LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement OrchestrationLive redesign (DAG with new GraphNode/Edge), IntakeLive (request queue, watchers, intake form), AlignmentLive (Plane-PM sync agent status, drift summary).
acceptanceCriteria: Orchestration DAG uses new GraphNode/Edge components
Alignment drift summary compares CLAUDE.md vs Plane

userStories.title: Govern: Approvals + Routing + Coalesce + UPM LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement ApprovalsLive redesign (AgentLock history, audit log timeline), RoutingLive (model + tool routing rules, latency matrix), CoalesceLive (merge runs, gate decisions), UpmLive redesign (projects, work items, drift indicators).
acceptanceCriteria: Approvals timeline renders all AgentLock events

userStories.title: Govern + Intelligence TDD suite
userStories.description: Write ExUnit test suite for Wave 5+6+7 views: SkillsLive (health grid events), MemoryLive (observation PubSub), DRTWLive (registry search), ApprovalsLive (audit log mount), RoutingLive (rule CRUD events).

userStories.title: Extend: Plugins + Integrations + AG-UI + Notifications LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement PluginsLive redesign (10 bundled plugins, health status), IntegrationsLive (IntegrationBehaviour catalog), AgUiLive (SSE stream viewer, event types, KPIs), NotificationsLive redesign (2K buffer, channel filter, group-by).
acceptanceCriteria: Plugins list shows all 10 bundled plugins with health
AG-UI SSE stream viewer shows live events

userStories.title: Extend: Showcase + Docs LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement ShowcaseLive redesign (CCEM environments, live preview panel) and DocsLive redesign (API reference viewer, OpenAPI spec browser, guides nav).
acceptanceCriteria: Showcase renders environment cards with live status

userStories.title: Platform: Architecture + DRTW + UAT LiveViews (Platform section)
userStories.description: Implement Platform-section ArchitectureLive full redesign (supervision tree with all GenServer nodes, ETS/PubSub/LiveView KPI strip) and Platform UAT (test matrix view).
acceptanceCriteria: Supervision tree shows all registered GenServers
Platform UAT matrix shows latest test run results

userStories.title: AI Platform: LVM Integration LiveView (Claude model cards, utilization)
userStories.description: Implement LVMLive: 4 Claude model cards (opus-4-7/sonnet-4-6/sonnet-dated/haiku-4-5) each showing tokens/hr Sparkline, cache hit rate Gauge, utilization bar. Per-project utilization table with % of dynamic cap.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 model cards render with live sparklines

userStories.title: AI Platform: Claude Code Discovery + Ralph Plugin LiveViews
userStories.description: Implement ClaudeCodeDiscoveryLive (MCP servers, hooks, skills registry viewer) and RalphPluginLive (methodology view, loop status, backpressure graph, current formation progress).
acceptanceCriteria: Claude Code Discovery shows all registered MCPs and hooks
Ralph Plugin shows live loop status

userStories.title: AI Platform: AG-UI Plugin + Authorization v9 deep page
userStories.description: Implement AgUiPluginLive (event types, SSE stream at :3032/api/v2/ag-ui/events, KPIs) and AuthorizationV9Live deep page (detailed policy editor, token_id filter, rule builder).
acceptanceCriteria: AG-UI Plugin SSE stream shows live events
Auth v9 policy editor saves rules to backend

userStories.title: Final: Extend + Platform + AI Platform TDD suite + v9.2.0 compile gate
userStories.description: Write ExUnit tests for Wave 8+9 views. Run full mix compile --warnings-as-errors. Run all mix test --only tags. Update CLAUDE.md version to v9.2.0.
